title: Pillager Medieval Mansion Dungeon
description: Medieval mansion that turns Pillager into trap-filled complexes with tactical combat and exclusive loot.
body:
Pillager Medieval Mansion Dungeon expands the Minecraft world by adding Pillager mansions into large-scale medieval dungeons focused on structured exploration and combat, featuring handcrafted rooms, hidden passages, traps, and multi-level interiors that reward careful progression, tactical encounters, and thorough exploration, while maintaining strong compatibility with the vanilla experience and providing meaningful loot that justifies the risk of conquering each mansion.
